structural_issues: Hero/main offer is not represented as the primary H1.
Multiple H1 headings are used for section titles.
No H2 headings were detected in the sampled homepage DOM.
Most meaningful images have empty alt attributes.
Open Graph image uses a weak Tilda CDN filename: ___.jpg.
Several internal/external links contain malformed hrefs such as https://moonn.ru/http://...

entity_linking.reason: Yandex Services and MSU Istina use the legal surname/name variant, while the public site primarily uses the brand/public name. Search engines may not merge these entities without explicit visible and structured linking.

verified_external_profiles.evidence: Public search result and Rutube video description reference the profile URL.
Istina public profile states the name and activity totals, including publications, one учебный курс, and conference talks.

entity_linking.visible_text_rule: Add one concise identity bridge near the biography/trust section: `Татьяна Мунн — публичное имя психолога Татьяны Михайловны Кумсковой; профиль на Яндекс Услугах и научно-образовательный профиль МГУ ИСТИНА подтверждают внешние площадки.` Edit for tone before publishing.
entity_linking.schema_rule: Add alternateName and sameAs to the Person entity. Do not hide the legal-name connection only in JSON-LD; it should be present in a concise visible biography/trust block.

primary_asset.source: Tilda CDN homepage portrait asset from the owned Moonn site
target_use: primary page image where Tilda upload allows replacement
primary_asset.alt: Татьяна Мунн, психолог МГУ в Москве

rules: Keep hidden marketing tokens out of visible page text.
Use concise descriptive alt text for meaningful images and empty alt for decorative gradients.
Prefer WebP for generated/owned replacements, but do not break existing Tilda image rendering.
For mass rollout, map each Tilda CDN image to a stable SEO filename before replacing it.

deferred_entities.reason: Add only after FAQ questions are visible on the page or inserted as real visible content.
Add only for verified reviews shown on-page and compliant with platform/search guidelines.

required_for_true_query_analysis: Google Search Console performance export for moonn.ru
Google Search Console page indexing report
Yandex Webmaster search queries and indexing diagnostics
Yandex Metrica or GA4 traffic and event data
Tilda forms/click goals or connected analytics goals

yandex_webmaster.visible_recommendation: Bind Yandex Metrica counter to Webmaster so the search robot receives signals about new pages.

yandex_metrica.decision_needed: Keep 96397286 as the canonical moonn.ru counter unless a later Tilda/Metrica audit contradicts the live HTML check.
yandex_metrica.canonical_counter_evidence: Live https://moonn.ru/ HTML contains Yandex Metrica id 96397286.

implementation_checklist: Run Tilda Site Settings -> SEO -> SEO Assistant before manual edits.
Update page SEO title and description in Tilda page settings.
Add page-level JSON-LD in Tilda HEAD for the homepage only.
Add visible identity bridge between `Татьяна Мунн`, `Татьяна Кумскова`, and `Кумскова Татьяна Михайловна` near the biography/trust section.
Add Yandex Services and MSU Istina links in visible trust/profile blocks.
Set social preview image/title/description using the SEO-named asset.
Fix primary H1/H2 hierarchy in page content.
Add alt text to meaningful homepage images.
Fix malformed links before production transfer.
Use Tilda 301 redirects for old or renamed URLs where links already exist in search.
Check generated robots.txt and sitemap.xml after publishing.
Run browser QA and source-code validation after publish.
Only then repeat the manifest pattern for copied pages.
tilda_native_seo_tools: Site Settings -> SEO -> Google Search Console
Site Settings -> SEO -> WWW, HTTPS Redirects
Page Settings -> SEO -> Customize search results preview
Page Settings -> Social media -> Customize social media preview
Block content image menu -> alt text
Page Settings -> Additional -> HTML code for Head

risk_flags: possible guarantee-like wording in current metadata
possible ambiguity between psychology and medical psychotherapy claims
compliance_gate.draft_decision: Avoid guarantee-like phrases and avoid medical-status wording unless credentials and legal wording are confirmed.
